---
layout: cv
title: Astoria Carroll's CV
---
# Astoria Carroll
Data Scientist, Analyst, Consultant.

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="car20132@byui.edu">car20132@byui.edu</a>
| <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Astoria_Carroll">My wikipedia page</a>
<!-- | <a href="https://NAC-Astoria.github.io/datascience_portfolio/gh-pages/resume.pdf">Download PDF</a> -->
| <a href="https://github.com/byuidatascience/datascience_portfolio/blob/gh-pages/resume.pdf">Download PDF</a>
</div>


## Currently

Gaining a degree in data science.

### Specialized in

Data science.


### Research interests

Analyisng cost trends.


## Education

`2019 - 2021`
__El Toro High School.__

`September 2021 - now`
__Brigham Young University - Idaho__




## Awards

`2019`
3rd place in Regonal marching band competition.




## Publications

<!-- A list is also available [online](http://scholar.google.co.uk/citations?user=LTOTl0YAAAAJ) -->

### Journals

None yet.

### Patents

None yet.


## Occupation

`2024 - now`
__McDonald's__, Rexburg, Idaho

- Crew Trainer

`2023 - 2023`
__Veritas__, Mareitta, Ohio

- After school care provider



<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: March 2026 -->
